name: anxiety
title: best herbal teas for anxiety
description: Vitex agnus-castus tea contains bioactive constituents such as iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to have anxiolytic and sedative properties. The tea's ability to regulate the body's hormonal balance, particularly estrogen levels, helps to alleviate symptoms of anxiety. To make this tea, steep 1-2 teaspoons of dried Vitex agnus-castus leaves in 1 cup of boiling water for 5-10 minutes, then strain and consume. Drinking 1-2 cups of this tea per day,...
